title: Finite Runge-Kutta Midpoint Checks

solver_reuse.target: finite Runge-Kutta midpoint bad first-step QF_LRA/Farkas regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: Exact rational RK2 midpoint replay for y' = 2t with h = 1/2 computes first next_state = 1/4, while a malformed row claims next_state = 1/2, isolating a compact scalar equality conflict for the Farkas route.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional time-stepping rows only when they add distinct Butcher tableau, stage-coupling, adaptive-step, stiffness, floating-point, or convergence-theorem pressure; keep general Runge-Kutta order and stability theory in future Lean or numerical-honesty lanes.

graduation_criteria: Encode the fixed ODE, step size, midpoint stages, midpoint derivatives, state updates, exact grid solution, and zero finite error table as deterministic rational replay obligations.
Route the false first RK midpoint step through checked QF_LRA/Farkas evidence after replay computes the exact next state.
Expose the pack through finite dynamics/time-stepping, numerical-analysis, real-analysis, and learner query surfaces.

Keep general Runge-Kutta order conditions, convergence, stability regions, stiffness behavior, adaptive methods, and floating-point time-stepping correctness marked as future Lean or numerical-honesty work until formal routes exist.
